proofRule: This creates real places to look, not proof. Never log a planned reply. Log only after a real X reply URL or precise private proof note exists.
qualityRule: Reply only to real football, World Cup, national team, prediction, ranking, or fan-debate posts. Skip unrelated posts, giveaways, political fights, and obvious bot engagement traps.
